data.name: LoginMonitor_InvalidMaxFailedLogins
data.value: The max failed logins is either too large or negative

data.name: LoginMonitor_InvalidCooldownPeriod
data.value: The cooldown period is either zero or too large

data.name: PasswordKeep_InvalidPassword
data.value: The password is not valid

data.name: PasswordKeep_NoPasswordHash
data.value: No password has yet been set for this user

data.name: PasswordKeep_InvalidPasswordHash
data.value: The password hash is not valid

data.name: PasswordKeep_TokensNotMatch
data.value: The password reset token is invalid

data.name: PasswordKeep_TokenExpired
data.value: The password reset token has expired

data.name: PasswordKeep_InvalidToken
data.value: The password reset token is either missing or invalid

data.name: PasswordCredentialsRoot_EmailNotUnique
data.value: The email is already in use by another user

data.name: PasswordCredentialsRoot_PasswordInitiatedWithoutRegistration
data.value: Cannot initiate password reset before the user is registered

data.name: PasswordCredentialsRoot_InvalidPassword
data.value: The password is not valid

data.name: PasswordCredentialsRoot_RegistrationVerified
data.value: The user's registration is already verified

data.name: PasswordCredentialsRoot_RegistrationNotVerifying
data.value: The user's registration confirmation cannot be confirmed

data.name: PasswordCredentialsRoot_RegistrationVerifyingExpired
data.value: The user's registration confirmation window has expired

data.name: PasswordCredentialsRoot_RegistrationUnverified
data.value: The user's registration has not been verified yet

data.name: PasswordCredentialsRoot_DuplicatePassword
data.value: New password cannot be the same as old password

data.name: PasswordCredentialsRoot_PasswordResetTokenExpired
data.value: The password reset confirmation has expired

data.name: PasswordCredentialsRoot_NoPassword
data.value: No password has yet been set for this user

data.name: AuthTokensRoot_TokensExpired
data.value: These tokens have already expired

data.name: AuthTokensRoot_RefreshTokenNotMatched
data.value: This refresh token is unknown or for another user

data.name: AuthTokensRoot_TokensRevoked
data.value: This refresh token has been revoked

data.name: AuthTokensRoot_RefreshTokenExpired
data.value: This refresh token has expired
